summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WM Group Admin Panel after refactoring. AdminPanel.jsx was successfully refactored from 3558 lines to 233 lines. All 23 admin tabs load correctly with their content. The refactoring extracted sauna-related tabs into separate self-contained components in /app/frontend/src/components/admin/.

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>' - React hydration warning caused by dynamic rendering with map() inside select elements. Not breaking functionality but should be addressed for cleaner HTML structure.

passed_tests: Admin login at /admin with credentials admin/220066 - WORKING
Messages tab (Сообщения) - Shows contact messages list (13 messages)
Calculator tab (Калькулятор) - Shows sauna models checkboxes and categories with options
Design tab (Оформление/layout) - Shows spacing settings (small/medium/large)
Buttons tab (Кнопки) - Shows button configuration
Content tab (Тексты) - Shows section text editors for gallery, calculator, stock, reviews, contact, footer
Hero tab - Shows hero background image settings
About tab (О компании) - Shows about section settings
Models tab (Модели) - Shows model showcase configuration
Reviews tab (Отзывы) - Shows reviews list with add button
FAQ tab - Shows FAQ items editor with questions and answers
SEO tab - Shows SEO title/description/keywords editors
Integrations tab (Интеграции) - Shows Telegram and AMO CRM settings
Catalog tab (Каталог) - Shows PDF catalog upload
Sections tab (Порядок) - Shows section ordering
Gallery tab (Галерея) - Shows gallery management
API Images tab (Фото из API) - Shows API images management
Stock saunas tab (В наличии) - Shows stock saunas list
Social proof tab (Счётчики) - Shows counter settings
Balia Products tab (Купели: Продукты) - Shows balia products management
Balia Testimonials tab (Купели: Отзывы) - Shows balia testimonials
Balia Content tab (Купели: Контент) - Shows balia content settings
Balia Configurator tab (Купели: Конфигуратор) - Shows balia configurator settings
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about HTML hydration errors in SaunaIntegrationsAdmin.jsx: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>' - caused by React's dynamic rendering with map() inside select elements. While not breaking functionality, this should be addressed for cleaner HTML structure.
The refactoring was successful - AdminPanel.jsx reduced from 3558 to 233 lines with all functionality preserved.
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel refactoring verified. All 23 tabs working correctly. AdminPanel.jsx now acts as an orchestrator (233 lines) that renders separate components for each tab. Components receive authHeader and showMessage as props. Tab IDs map to components via switch statement in renderTab(). Balia tabs were already separate components before refactoring. The main change was extracting sauna tabs (Messages, Design, Content, Calculator, Reviews, Gallery, ModelsStock, FAQ, SEO, Integrations, CatalogSections) into separate files in /app/frontend/src/components/admin/.

admin_login.details: Login with admin/220066 credentials works correctly

tab_navigation.details: All 23 tabs navigate and load content correctly

sauna_messages_admin.details: SaunaMessagesAdmin component loads and displays messages list

sauna_calculator_admin.details: SaunaCalculatorAdmin component loads with models and categories

sauna_design_admin.details: SaunaDesignAdmin component handles site, layout, and buttons sub-tabs

sauna_content_admin.details: SaunaContentAdmin component handles content, hero, and about sub-tabs

sauna_reviews_admin.details: SaunaReviewsAdmin component loads reviews with add/edit/delete functionality

sauna_gallery_admin.details: SaunaGalleryAdmin component handles gallery and api_images sub-tabs

sauna_models_stock_admin.details: SaunaModelsStockAdmin component handles models, stock_saunas, and social_proof sub-tabs

sauna_faq_admin.details: SaunaFaqAdmin component loads FAQ items editor

sauna_integrations_admin.details: SaunaIntegrationsAdmin component loads Telegram and AMO CRM settings

sauna_catalog_sections_admin.details: SaunaCatalogSectionsAdmin component handles catalog and sections sub-tabs

balia_components.details: All Balia components (Products, Testimonials, Content, Configurator) load correctly

refactoring_summary.architecture: Each component is self-contained with its own state and data fetching. Components receive authHeader and showMessage as props from AdminPanel.jsx
